name: Judd's Golf Sim
about: Judd's Golf Sim is an indoor golf practice facility founded by PGA Professional Judd Stephenson. The venue features three TrackMan 4 Golf simulators and a 1,000-square-foot putting and chipping area, offering a year-round golf experience in a private setting. It is located off I-90 in Avon. The facility provides PGA Professional lessons, professional club fitting, and practice plans, with membership programs designed to help golfers improve their game through consistent practice and play. Members have access to a comprehensive TrackMan library with over 90 courses, including famous locations like Muirfield Village and Pebble Beach, as well as outdoor access to TrackMan launch monitors during the summer months.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan 4 simulators with 90+ famous course options
Year-round access with outdoor launch monitor availability for 12-month members
Comprehensive membership options including included simulator hours and keyless entry
PGA Professional instruction and professional club fitting services
Private, focused environment for dedicated practice and improvement

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food services available on-site
No mention of alcohol services available on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Three fully turfed TrackMan 4 Golf Simulator bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to use at the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any restrictions on bringing outside food or drinks, so it is likely permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While the exact time isn't specified, TrackMan simulators typically allow for 18 holes to be played in 2-3 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers junior lessons programs, indicating it accommodates younger golfers.
